engagementShape: fixed-scope discovery sprint (2 weeks), with optional implementation phase
introContext: AECTech 2026 — sponsor or exhibitor; first conversation.
callObjective: Identify one concrete pain in Visual Workforce's AI / data roadmap that Arvaya can credibly accelerate, then decide whether a 2-week discovery sprint is worth proposing.
hypothesis: Visual Workforce has shipped its core product but is now under pressure to add AI-native capabilities. The applied-ML / data org is likely thin relative to the roadmap, so build-vs-partner is live.
meetingContext: First conversation. Visual Workforce is on the AECTech 2026 exhibitor list. Use the brief to find a credible wedge before the meeting.
description: A skills management and workforce planning platform that helps firms visualize their employees' capabilities for better project staffing.
